{{Infobox character
| name = Brother Aekin
| aliases = Aekin
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Enforcer technique]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Uncrowned]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]]}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

''See also: [[Brother Aekin Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Brother Aekin, also known as Aekin, was an [[Uncrowned]] member of the [[Abyssal Palace]], a cult dedicated to the [[Wandering Titan]]. He typically dressed in hooded [[sacred artist's robe{{!}}sacred artist's robes]] of slate gray, black, or brown and wore a dark [[stone]] [[The mask{{!}}mask]] carved to look like a snarling creature, featuring a glowing yellow light in its right eye socket. In combat, Aekin utilized a hammer and employed various martial abilities, including [[Striker]] and [[Ruler techniques]]. He could manifest [[yellow madra]] to serve as protective armor or use it to push opponents away. His [[Path]] focused on high levels of endurance, allowing him to survive severe injuries such as broken limbs and a damaged neck. Despite his combat skills and ability to combine different techniques, he was eventually defeated and killed during a confrontation in the [[Hollow Domain]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] is from [[Abyssal Palace]] and wears hooded [[sacred artist's robe{{!}}sacred artist’s robes]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Maraan]] oversaw the early training of [[Brother Aekin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] could not handle the opponents [[Lindon]] faced.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] is [[Ziel of the Wasteland{{!}}Ziel]]'s rematch opponent.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]]'s [[Path]] is modeled after the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]]'s [[Path]] emphasizes endurance.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] was the target of [[Ziel of the Wasteland{{!}}Ziel]]'s brief rampage.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] is a person [[Lindon]] thought he could beat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara]] would fight [[Brother Aekin]] in the [[tournament]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] was obliterated by [[Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin{{!}}Aekin]] was wearing a [[stone]] [[The mask{{!}}mask]] with one eye glowing yellow.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] competed against [[Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] used his [[Enforcer technique]] to take on the aspect of the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] is an [[Uncrowned]] of [[Abyssal Palace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Brother Aekin]] was part of the group under the [[Sage of Red Faith]] that ambushed [[Mercy]] and [[Akura Pride{{!}}Pride]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
